data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ChairmansYoun: Er-hem!\pI am the POKéMON FAN CLUB's most\nimportant person, the CHAIRMAN's\lyounger brother.\pI'm here enjoying my vacation with\nPOKéMON, yes, indeed.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_AdoringPokemo: It clearly likes you very much.\pA POKéMON that adoring and adorable\ndeserves a TM like this, no?
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_PutInSomeMore: Hmm...\nIt's not bad, but it's also not good.\pYou, as the TRAINER, need to put in\nsome more effort.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ViciousPokemo: It has a vicious look to it.\pA frightening POKéMON like that\ndeserves a TM like this.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ExplainReturn: If a POKéMON likes you a lot, RETURN's\npower is enhanced.\pIf it doesn't like you, FRUSTRATION's\npower goes up.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_GetGoodTMInXD: Oh, yes. In about {STR_VAR_1} or so days,\nI should be getting a good TM or two.\pYou should come see me then.\nI'll give you a TM that's suitable for\lyour POKéMON.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_VeryFriendlyW: It appears to be very friendly with the\nTRAINER.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_DoesntLikeTra: It doesn't appear to like the TRAINER\nvery much.
